synopsis: Han Solo remains frozen in carbonite and in Imperial hands, and the rebels aboard the *Millennium Falcon* set out to recover him. They are not alone: both Boba Fett and Valance are on a collision course with the *Falcon* and the Imperial shuttle carrying Solo. Neither group anticipates that the Hutts will arrive with an entire armada, turning the hunt for the frozen smuggler into a full-scale confrontation.
title: War of the Bounty Hunters #5
